description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open-plan design with a polygonal base and several partition walls forming semi-enclosed display and interaction zones. The structure is predominantly white, with large, flat wall panels that serve as display surfaces for graphics and information. A prominent digital screen is mounted on one of the central partitions, likely for multimedia presentations or interactive content. Above the kiosk, a large, suspended sign with the name 'PUTT SIRISAKSOPIT' provides clear identification and visibility from a distance. The kiosk lacks a traditional roof, instead opting for an open-air layout that encourages easy access from multiple sides. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functionality and visual communication.
description: A modern, open-air kiosk with white partition walls, a polygonal base, a digital display, and a large suspended name sign. The design is minimalist and highly accessible from all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open layout, central digital display, and the large overhead 'PUTT SIRISAKSOPIT' sign.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back partition walls and the reverse side of the suspended sign.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the kiosk, the arrangement of partitions, and the digital display's placement.
description_view_3: Frontal perspective with a clear view of the open entry, display partitions, and the prominent overhead signage.
attribute_signage_type: Large suspended printed sign above the kiosk with the text 'PUTT SIRISAKSOPIT', highly visible and integrated into the structure.
attribute_door_configuration: none; open entryways on multiple sides
attribute_roof_design: No roof; open-air design with only a suspended sign overhead.
